compiled_state.title: GREEN: Add scenario-driven SC revision with re-approval to brainstorm SKILL.md

compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
After Step 3 (Scenario Analysis Output), add SC gap check: inspect surviving scenarios for SC coverage gaps. If found, revise SCs and present via AskUserQuestion for re-approval before Step 4. Include replan path handling.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] brainstorm SKILL.md contains SC revision logic
  Verify: grep -q 'SC.*revision\|SC.*gap\|success criteria.*revis' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] brainstorm SKILL.md contains re-approval via AskUserQuestion
  Verify: grep -q 'AskUserQuestion.*re-approv\|re-approv.*AskUserQuestion' plugins/dso/skills/brainstorm/SKILL.md
- [ ] test-scenario-sc-revision.sh passes (GREEN)
  Verify: bash tests/hooks/test-scenario-sc-revision.sh
